ideation: This animation sequence will depict a ram butting its head, using the robot arms to simulate the horns.  Since the robot lacks elbows and thumbs, the animation will focus on the overall head-butting motion.  The animation will utilize both arms in a mirrored fashion to create the effect of horns. Frame 1 will show the arms starting in a neutral position. Frame 2 will show the arms moving forward, slightly downward, and inward, to simulate the beginning of a headbutt. Frame 3 will depict the impact, where the arms are extended forward, and slightly downward. Frame 4 will depict the retraction of the arms to a more neutral position. The wrists will remain neutral throughout the sequence, and the overall movement will emphasize the forward momentum of the headbutt.

frames.beat: arms pull back, ready to charge
horns lower and thrust forward, gathering momentum
a solid headbutt impact, horns meet target
horns retract, shaking off the blow
